office_does: The sheriff leads patrol, investigations, jail, civil process, staffing, and interagency public safety.
race_blurb: A retired police chief faces two current county sheriff's-office candidates.

candidates.summary: Retired chief of three police agencies with graduate education and FBI National Academy training.
highlights: Has prior executive command of multiple police agencies [S2][S3]

experience.basis: Executive command of three police agencies establishes the field's maximal proven leadership record.

candidates.summary: County detective sergeant with patrol, training, warrants, marine, tactical, and municipal experience.
highlights: Holds current county supervisory and training responsibilities [S2]

experience.basis: Current county supervisory work across multiple operational assignments establishes substantial relevant experience.

candidates.summary: County deputy with more than a decade of direct investigative experience.

experience.basis: More than a decade of direct county-agency work supports a record-oriented placement.
